case_title: JUAN LEON NUNEZ VS. PRO QUALITY BUILDERS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NUNEZ, JUAN LEON AS TO DEFENDANT PRO QUALITY BUILDERS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATI ON JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NUNEZ, JUAN LEON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRO QUALITY BUILDERS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATI ON $8,393.40 PRINCIPAL, $86.42 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,704.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
